The '''Rodian death blade''' was a short sword with a [[Color/Legends|black]] and red hilt. This more powerful version of the standard [[Rodian blade]] was coated in a molecular-bonded [[Poison/Legends|poison]] that caused extreme pain and even [[Death/Legends|death]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
